title: Dinosaurs in the Jungle
description: On pages 13–16, dinosaurs in the jungle as the Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger.
scene: Dinosaurs in the Jungle. The Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This'll be a good chance to see which is stronger... your unarmed combat... or my sword fighting...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Good! Let's make it clear once and for all!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What do I do...? I want to run away...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But I wonder if I'll be safe just passing them by...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Curses! How dare those two make fools of us...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Our pride as Baroque works officer agents has been tainted!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So let us wash away this humiliation by showing them the true terror of our strength!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on dinosaurs in the jungle. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
